SQLScript:
WITH Months AS (
SELECT 
         em.StartDate
        ,em.EndDate
        ,em.PlanMemberID
        ,em.UniquePersonkey
        ,COALESCE(nullif(em.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(em.PlanMemberID,'None')) AS MemberID
        ,em.FileId
        ,em.StartDate OriginalStartDate
        ,em.EndDate OriginalEndDate
        ,explode(month_range(coalesce(StartDate,to_date('1900-01-01')), coalesce(EndDate,to_date('9999-12-31')))) AS SplitStartDate
FROM MemberEnrollment em
WHERE
em.FileID = (SELECT MAX(mem.FileId) FROM MemberEnrollment mem WHERE mem.FileLayoutDescription LIKE '%Mem%Enroll%') 
AND
em.StartDate <> IfNULL(to_date(em.EndDate),'9999-12-31') and em.StartDate < IfNULL(to_date(em.EndDate),'9999-12-31')
),
ConvertToMontly AS(
SELECT 
         em.SplitStartDate AS StartDate
        ,last_day(SplitStartDate) AS EndDate
        ,em.PlanMemberID
        ,em.UniquePersonkey
        ,em.MemberID
        ,em.FileId
        ,em.StartDate OriginalStartDate
        ,em.EndDate OriginalEndDate
FROM Months em
WHERE 
last_day(em.SplitStartDate) <= last_day(IfNULL(to_date(em.EndDate),'9999-12-31'))
),
ApplyFilter AS(
SELECT 
         PlanMemberID
        ,UniquePersonkey
        ,MemberID
        ,FileId
        ,StartDate
        ,EndDate
        ,OriginalStartDate
        ,OriginalEndDate
FROM ConvertToMontly
WHERE
add_months(CAST(DATE_TRUNC("year", current_date()) AS DATE), -30) <= StartDate
AND
EndDate <= last_day(current_date()) --eliminates possibility of future people
),
MemberPersonBridgeTemp AS (
SELECT 
         BISInternalPersonID
        ,nullif(PlanMemberID,'None') AS PlanMemberID
        ,nullif(UniquePersonKey,'None') AS UniquePersonKey
        ,COALESCE(nullif(UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(PlanMemberID,'None')) AS MemberID
        ,IsCurrent
FROM MemberPersonBridge
),
FilterMPBByApply AS (
SELECT DISTINCT
         mpb.BISInternalPersonID
        ,nullif(mpb.PlanMemberID,'None') AS PlanMemberID
        ,nullif(mpb.UniquePersonKey,'None') AS UniquePersonKey
        ,mpb.MemberID
        ,mpb.IsCurrent
FROM MemberPersonBridgeTemp mpb 
WHERE
mpb.BISInternalPersonID IN(
      SELECT BISInternalPersonID
      FROM MemberPersonBridgeTemp
      WHERE
      MemberID IN(SELECT MemberId FROM ApplyFilter)
    )
)
SELECT
   BISInternalPersonID
  ,PlanMemberID
  ,UniquePersonKey
FROM FilterMPBByApply
WHERE
IsCurrent = 1
